known_observations: page title indicates Struts2 Showcase - Fileupload sample
recent_results: vuln_analysis produced web fingerprint for http://10.20.0.10:8080/

success_criteria: Identify whether a safe validation profile or other bounded validation applies to the 10.20.0.10:8080 web application
If a valid bounded profile exists, execute non-destructive validation and return evidence-backed result

nodes.summary: Recon and fingerprinting identified a likely vulnerable web target, but no goal evidence or stop eligibility is present. The next evidence gap is bounded validation of the candidate web exposure on 10.20.0.10:8080.

nodes.label: RECON_STAGE result
nodes.summary: Recon established initial authorized visibility in 10.20.0.0/24 from existing stage evidence. Nmap scan evidenced 6 live hosts: 10.20.0.1, 10.20.0.2, 10.20.0.3, 10.20.0.10, 10.20.0.11, 10.20.0.50. Open services discovered: 10.20.0.1:111/tcp rpcbind 2-4 (RPC #100000); 10.20.0.3:8000/tcp HTTP/Uvicorn; 10.20.0.10:8080/tcp HTTP/Jetty 9.2.11.v20150529; 10.20.0.11:80/tcp HTTP/Apache httpd 2.4.25 ((Debian)); 10.20.0.50:2222/tcp SSH/OpenSSH 10.2. Negative evidence: 10.20.0.2 was up but all 1000 scanned TCP ports were closed/reset; 10.20.0.1 had 8000/tcp filtered. This satisfies the success criteria by identifying multiple authorized live hosts and reachable services with evidenced metadata.

nodes.label: EXPLOIT_STAGE result
nodes.summary: exploit_validation_agent finished

nodes.label: VULN_ANALYSIS_STAGE result
nodes.summary: 已基于已有证据与本阶段工具结果完成有界漏洞分析。最有希望的目标是 10.20.0.10:8080：Nmap 识别为 Jetty 9.2.11.v20150529，且 web_fingerprint 明确返回页面标题“Struts2 Showcase - Fileupload sample”，说明该 HTTP 服务很可能运行 Apache Struts2 Showcase 示例应用。该上下文使其成为后续安全验证的优先候选，但当前仅能证明产品/页面特征，尚无漏洞存在证据。对该目标执行 vuln_profile_match 未返回任何可直接套用的受控验证 profile，因此当前不能直接声称存在特定 CVE，也缺少可立即执行的 validation profile。其余服务中，10.20.0.11:80 为 Apache httpd 2.4.25 (Debian)、10.20.0.3:8000 为 Uvicorn、10.20.0.50:2222 为 OpenSSH 10.2、10.20.0.1:111 为 rpcbind；基于现有元数据均不足以形成可信漏洞结论，只能作为后续补充指纹或目录发现候选。

nodes.label: EXPLOIT_STAGE result
